description: Configure isolated DSL branch state and verify automated reasoning tools
outputs: DSL setup report and initialized project state

description: Maintain DSL canonical model validation provenance and status
outputs: DSL canonical model status provenance and validation records

description: Run the isolated DSL branch with canonical assertions ontology ASM and delta validation
outputs: dsl brainstorm artifact canonical DSL ontology ASM deltas increment validation

description: Create PRDs grounded in accepted DSL assertions deltas and validation state
outputs: dsl PRD accepted deltas validation posture verification obligations

description: Refine the accepted DSL baseline into architecture with architecture-level deltas
outputs: dsl architecture artifact design decisions architecture deltas ontology and ASM refinement

description: Map accepted DSL requirements and architecture context into evidence-aware epics
outputs: dsl epics coverage map accepted delta lineage validation posture story obligations

description: Create stories that preserve DSL evidence posture delta lineage and readiness blockers
outputs: dsl stories acceptance criteria alignment blockers readiness delta lineage

description: Derive per-story Hoare-style implementation contracts from the accepted DSL baseline
outputs: dsl contract inventories grounding audits implementation mappings exported tool views

description: Generate contract-bearing source-tree scaffolds and require scaffold review before implementation
outputs: dsl scaffold files review checklist contract surface mappings

description: Implement approved scaffolds while preserving contracts and adding body-level proof obligations
outputs: implemented code preserving scaffold contracts and added proof obligations

description: Verify implementation artifacts against generated contracts and classify evidence strength
outputs: code verification reports contract coverage evidence classifications counterexamples readiness

description: Run checkpoint verification over the DSL baseline deltas contracts stubs and readiness
outputs: dsl verification reports baseline audits increment validation rechecks readiness
